basic_details.job_title: IIM Guwahati Accountant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati) Accountant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIM Guwahati. Has been announced through the IIM Guwahati Accountant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: As per GOI rules

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Commerce (B.Com) or Accounting/Finance. Candidates with M.Com, MBA (Finance), CA Inter, CMA, ICWA
qualification.details: Qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Commerce (B.Com) or Accounting/Finance. Candidates with M.Com, MBA (Finance), CA Inter, CMA, ICWA or relevant accounting certifications will be preferred. Experience: At least 5 years post qualification professional experience in the field of Finance/ Accounts/ Audit Departments. Similar work experience in reputed educational institutions such as IIMs, IITs etc./ autonomous body/ PSU would be preferable. An excellent knowledge of accounting software or ERP platforms like Tally Prime/Enterprise Resource Planning/SAP tools and Fixed Asset module is necessary.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Guwahati Accountant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Guwahati Accountant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Accountant position at IIM Guwahati is 06 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required educational qualification for the Accountant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Bachelor’s degree in Commerce (B.Com) or Accounting/Finance. Additional qualifications like M.Com, MBA (Finance), CA Inter, CMA, or ICWA are preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum experience required for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of post-qualification professional experience in Finance, Accounts, or Audit Departments is required for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Accountant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Accountant position is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be paid as per Pay Level 06 under the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IIM Guwahati Accountant recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Indian Institute of Management Guwahati.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
